name: Bhai Avtar Singh Bodal
body: Bhai Avtar Singh Ji is the son of the esteemed Kirtani, Bhai Dilbagh Singh Ji. Their familial lineage can be traced back to the Rababi, Bhai Choohad, who received blessings from Guru Har Gobind Sahib Ji during Guru Ji’s visit to the village of Bodalan. Having undergone training under his father, Bhai Avtar Singh Ji’s musical style is significantly influenced by the Patiala Gharana.

From an early age, Bhai Avtar Singh Ji has actively participated in various competitions, achieving first place in numerous contests at both the university and national levels. His extensive travels have taken him to Malaysia, Singapore, Canada, the United States of America, and England.

Furthermore, Bhai Avtar Singh Ji has a rich professional background. He served as a music lecturer at G.K.S.M. Government College, Tanda, from 1995 to 1998. Following this, he held the position of a music lecturer at G.T.B. Khalsa College for Women, Dasuya, from 1998 to 2001. Since then, he has been fulfilling the role of Head of the Department at the college.
Notably, Bhai Avtar Singh Ji’s legacy extends to his sons, Livtar Singh and Harbagh Singh, who are diligently following in his footsteps and carrying forward the musical torch.
If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Avtar Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
